headline: ECO's Focus on Dividend-Payments Bodes Well: More Upside Ahead?
summary: Okeanis Eco Tankers touts a 16.6% yield as dividends hit 16 straight quarters, with Q1 2026 payout rising to $2 ahead of June 5 payment.
